title: Transitional Housing/Shelter * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Transitional Housing/Shelter * AIDS/HIV 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth nsitional Housing/Shelter AIDS/HIV Crime Victims Disabilities Issues Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAP HOUSING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management to help individuals find housing and related resources. Services include short- and long-term housing search support and one-time emergency rental assistance for security deposits or eviction prevention. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides HIV testing, expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAP HOUSING SERVICES HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT
